required_preferences.fact: Attends large networking events and industry gatherings when required for professional growth, despite usually avoiding such settings in her personal life

supersedes.fact: Hosts monthly game nights at her apartment, inviting only close college friends—never attends large gatherings

required_preferences.fact: Uses contract drafting software with voice input and auto-generation tools to reduce typing; avoids manual drafting due to wrist pain

supersedes.fact: Always drafts contracts herself; refuses to use generic online templates

required_preferences.fact: Schedules business admin tasks strictly for Fridays—never lets invoices or marketing spill into client workdays
Keeps a detailed log of pain symptoms and PT exercises at her workstation, updating it during each break for better tracking and communication with her therapist
Watches new indie films at local theaters—never streams blockbuster movies online
Offers babysitting for neighbor’s children only during pre-arranged school breaks—never accepts same-day requests

persona: A freelance consultant specializing in CRM solutions for small businesses
